title: Specify `device` consistently for domains

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
All canopy components but radiative transfer and hydraulics use `update_X(p,Y,component, canopy)` syntax in update aux to hide the update details. Plant hydraulics and radiation were the exception, mostly likely because we did not need to dispatch on the type of the component model. Even so, it is nice to use the same syntax for these, and it makes the canopy update aux function more readable. In the future, with different moisture stress parameterizations, we do not need to use the same plant hydraulics model and may introduce another type there also. This also sets us up for that.


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: Unify `update!` usage in canopy update aux

## Purpose 
We do not dispatch off them; these are not needed.

They also can lead to bugs when new canopy components are introduced (if these are not all updated to reflect that)
